name: player_keeptradecut_value range year_offset averages the offset-window snapshots
description: keeptradecut_rankings is date-grained (no year column), so a range year_offset cannot use the generic year-based correlated-aggregate path -- it previously emitted invalid SQL against an unjoined alias / silently collapsed to year_offset[0]. The bespoke main_select_string_year_offset_range emits AVG(v) over the snapshots at opening_day(anchor) + k years for k in the offset range. Verified against production: base 2021 +[1,2] for Aaron Jones AVGs 4529 (2022) and 3631 (2023) to 4080.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT AVG(ktc_o.v) FROM keeptradecut_rankings ktc_o JOIN opening_days od_o ON od_o.year = 2023 WHERE ktc_o.pid = player.pid AND ktc_o.qb = 2 AND ktc_o.type = 1 AND ktc_o.d IN (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (date_trunc('day', od_o.opening_day) + interval '1 year'))::integer, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (date_trunc('day', od_o.opening_day) + interval '2 year'))::integer)) AS "player_keeptradecut_value_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
